Title: Keyboard shortcuts
Summary: Full list of keyboard shortcuts that exist anywhere in the app.
Body:
## Global

- :kbd[Ctrl+K] (or :kbd[Cmd+K]) focus the [global search](/help/editor-basics/app-search)
- :kbd[Escape] close modals, dropdowns, the search palette, or the image editor

## On the Help page

- :kbd[/] focus the in page Help search from anywhere on a Help page
- :kbd[ArrowDown] / :kbd[ArrowUp] walk Help search results
- :kbd[Enter] navigate to the active result

## In the dialog graph

- :kbd[Backspace] delete selected nodes or edges (a confirm modal warns before destructive deletes)
- :kbd[Enter] commit an inline edit (edge label, sequence prompt)
- :kbd[Escape] cancel an inline edit
- Drag a choice handle to empty canvas to spawn a new sequence

## In forms

Standard browser shortcuts work: :kbd[Ctrl+A] select all, :kbd[Ctrl+C] copy, :kbd[Ctrl+V] paste, :kbd[Ctrl+Z] undo within a single field. Bleepforge does not implement an undo stack across the form itself; if you need to back out a change you have already saved, look at git or use the Saves activity feed to find the prior state.
